Calendar node
tasks.notes: Calendar node: a JSON view that places rows on a month grid by date. Reusable across apps (tasks/events).

tasks.title: Per-app launcher icons
tasks.notes: Per-app launcher icons: give each app on the home launcher its own distinct tile icon.

tasks.title: Events: decide where events sync from
tasks.notes: Events data source. DECIDED: .ics calendar feeds + optional login to account calendars (Google/Apple).

tasks.title: Align workboard status to tiers
tasks.notes: Map task status to shared priority tiers. OVERLAPS the new priority model — merge with the task-model task (see d10).

tasks.title: On-demand registry sync function
tasks.notes: Pull-on-demand sync action in dbkit's store registry (refresh a source when asked, not auto). Reused by Drive sync.

tasks.title: Parent picker for nested rows
tasks.notes: Record-editor control to pick/change a row's parent, so subtasks can be nested from the UI.

tasks.title: List overflow / scroll fix
tasks.notes: Fix long lists overflowing / not scrolling within their container.

tasks.title: Collapse old-done in list view
tasks.notes: Auto-collapse old completed items in list views to cut clutter.

tasks.title: Theme / locale picker
tasks.notes: The visible half of Language-next: settings UI to pick app theme + locale. Pairs with 51eadf8b + t80. Effort: M.

tasks.title: Per-app Drive sync
tasks.notes: Per-app cloud sync via Google Drive. BLOCKED: needs per-app OAuth, awkward on desktop/isan (see d12).

tasks.title: Ship Taskly as seeded bundle
tasks.notes: Package Taskly as a DbBundle pre-loaded with starter tasks/notes so it opens populated. Decide starter content.

tasks.title: Open schema map into diagram
tasks.notes: Open the auto-generated ER diagram (schema_map app) inside the editable diagram applet to rearrange/annotate.

tasks.title: Table node with dropdowns
tasks.notes: Finish the table view's inline editing: enum/ref cells edit via dropdowns.

tasks.title: Devgraph layout mode
tasks.notes: Canvas 'graph' layout deriving node positions from track lanes + milestone columns (swimlane timeline).

tasks.title: Complex filtering / analytics
tasks.notes: Advanced filtering + analytics (likely a hosted/paid feature).

tasks.title: ICS sync source
tasks.notes: Concrete .ics feed source for events (implements the events decision).

tasks.title: Events map view
tasks.notes: Show events on a map (reuses the map node).

tasks.title: Paid filtering tier
tasks.notes: Monetized advanced filtering (see monetization decision).

tasks.title: Dating matching backend
tasks.notes: Backend + matching for the dating app; likely mesh-based.

tasks.title: Mesh P5 real Nostr transport + keypairs
tasks.notes: Mesh P5: real Nostr transport + keypairs.

tasks.title: Mesh P6 engine MeshSyncProvider
tasks.notes: Mesh P6: engine-level MeshSyncProvider so any app can mesh-sync.

tasks.title: Mesh revocation / TTL
tasks.notes: Mesh access revocation + time-to-live for shared data.

tasks.title: Mesh peer discovery
tasks.notes: Mesh peer discovery.

tasks.title: Per-locale overlay + language files
tasks.notes: Deep half of Language: per-app language files + locale overlays. Effort: L. Follows the picker.

tasks.title: GitHub Actions web deploy
tasks.notes: CI to build + deploy the web build (GitHub Actions).

tasks.title: Decentralized keypair login
tasks.notes: Identity via keypair, no central account.

tasks.title: Charge for heavy hosted logic
tasks.notes: Monetize compute-heavy hosted features.

tasks.title: Ads-free vs ad-supported model
tasks.notes: Decide monetization: ads-free vs ad-supported (see decision).

tasks.title: Workboard unit field for filtering
tasks.notes: Add a filter control to show tasks for a chosen unit/project (units column already exists).

tasks.title: Reconnect Drive sink (cloud sync)
tasks.notes: Wire a real CloudSync into the DriveSink slot so changes sync to a cloud file across devices/people. — Wire a real CloudSync into the DriveSink slot for cross-device/people sync.

tasks.title: Two-way mirror: app reads back my edits
tasks.notes: Make the local mirror bidirectional: app watches the shared folder and merges external (Claude) edits by id, with a loop guard. Desktop + app running. — App watches the shared mirror folder (_devdata/_worksync) and merges Claude's JSON edits back by id, with a loop guard — bidirectional sync.

tasks.title: Filter for views — by column + operator (incl. is-empty/null)
tasks.notes: User-facing filter on any view. Operators: isEmpty/isNotEmpty (null), equals, contains, before/after/range. Example you asked for: show tasks where `completed` is empty (not yet done). Folds into t98. Effort: M.

tasks.title: clicking on columns to reorder; hold to filter (text/regex, and/or)
tasks.notes: Table headers: tap = sort/reorder, long-press = filter (text + regex, AND/OR).

tasks.title: Language settings (global + per-app) — NEXT
tasks.notes: NEXT BUILD (user-chosen). A global app language + per-app override. Scope: locale picker in settings (t65) + per-app language files/overlays (t80). Effort: L (i18n plumbing once, then JSON per app). Engine-owner session: do this next.

tasks.title: distinguish settings levels (architecture vs app vs view)
tasks.notes: Design the settings hierarchy: platform/architecture vs per-app vs per-view (see d13).

tasks.title: light/dark + custom color themes
tasks.notes: Theming: light/dark + custom palette (extensible). Overlaps t65.

tasks.title: Workboard tab buttons all the same — hard to navigate
tasks.notes: DONE (tabs restyled to tonal chips). Was stuck on an invalid phase 'todo' — corrected to past.

tasks.title: table view hard to navigate; cut off without full screen
tasks.notes: Table view: use full width/height + scroll/paging/sticky header for large tables (related t63).

tasks.title: prioritize tasks: priority tiers separate from phase + sensible defaults
tasks.notes: Task model: priority tiers separate from phase; new-task defaults; completion date marks done. Needs t89 (see d10).

tasks.title: Worklog: record what each nightly run did
tasks.notes: Worklog: each nightly run appends a dated entry + stamps completed tasks; a Worklog tab shows a reverse-chron feed.

tasks.title: Add created / completed / priority columns to tasks
tasks.notes: Add created / completed / priority columns to tasks — schema for prioritization + worklog stamps.

tasks.title: Responsive launcher tiles (phone/tablet/browser)
tasks.notes: DONE: launcher grid now sizes by extent so app tiles reflow across phone/tablet/browser instead of two huge cards.

tasks.title: Events: log into account calendars (Google/Apple)
tasks.notes: From the events decision: authenticate to calendar accounts to pull events (OAuth). Desktop feasibility TBD (see d12).

tasks.title: Extract sync into a fundamental package
tasks.notes: Move sync sinks/pipeline out of isan/lib/src/sync into a package. Recommend dbkit or new synckit; keep DbBundle packing in datakit; flutterboard only triggers via functions (see d11).

tasks.title: Refine all 12 applets for usability + responsiveness
tasks.notes: DONE: reworked cooking, fridge, notes, taskly, diagram, schema_map, arch_map, ri_map, neujour, events, dating, bikeshare — clearer purpose, captions, grouping/filtering, first-run seed, no fixed widths (responsive).

tasks.title: BIG: Decentralized data — conflict-safe merge (CRDT + signatures, not blockchain)
tasks.notes: Major initiative. Flexible data creation + safe merge across devices/people without erasing critical info. Direction: signatures (authenticity) + CRDT keep-both (safe auto-merge) + version vectors (lineage); NOT blockchain (it discards forks). Staged in mesh/ as R&D, integrate at mesh P6. Full design: DECENTRALIZED_DATA.md.

tasks.title: Workboard: single list view + saved preset filter views (fold Recent/Completed tabs)
tasks.notes: Consolidate Recent / Completed / etc. into ONE cards view with a search bar + selectable PRESET filter views (saved filter sets you can pick and add to). A preset is just a named filter/sort/group config; the view stays editable. Cuts tab clutter.

tasks.title: Unified editor: merge < > JSON + pencil structured into one view (live preview + side drawer: tree/attributes + JSON toggle)
tasks.notes: One editing surface. Default = the live 'current view' with placeholders. A collapsible side drawer holds the widget-tree + widget-attribute editors AND a toggle to view/edit the raw JSON, switching back and forth on the same doc. Supersedes the separate StructuredEditor (pencil) + BuilderPanel (< >).

tasks.title: ui.json file edits should reflect (hot-restart) + make < > editor reliably apply to live UI
tasks.notes: Editing ui.json on disk only reflects after a hot RESTART in debug (file is read at launch), not hot reload. The < > (BuilderPanel) edits don't update the live UI as reliably as the pencil (StructuredEditor) does — repair/unify so layout edits apply consistently. Folds into the unified-editor work.

tasks.title: Author mode via launcher long-press; normal run is read-only (no widget editing)
tasks.notes: Long-press an applet on the launcher -> highlight + 'Edit' -> opens the applet in author mode (unified editor, all screens). Normal tap just runs the app with no widget-editing UI. AppScreen gains an editMode flag.

tasks.title: FUTURE: per-widget end-user editing within constraints (e.g. dashboard) without full widget tree
tasks.notes: Mark specific widgets as user-editable with a BOUNDED edit surface (only allowed props), gated separately from full author mode, so an end user can tweak e.g. a dashboard widget without opening the applet's whole widget tree. Builds on the unified editor.

tasks.title: Canvas/map: own gestures (no page-scroll steal)
tasks.notes: DONE: screens that contain a canvas/map are no longer wrapped in the page's vertical scroll, so node drag (both axes) is handled by the view instead of panning the page. Fixes diagram nodes not moving.

tasks.title: Detail view: side panel on wide/tablet, bottom sheet on phone
tasks.notes: CONFIRMED by macOS/browser screenshots: the wide layout has empty space ideal for a SIDE detail panel. Open a row/task's detail in a right-side panel on wide screens; bottom sheet on phone. Per-object-type: side|sheet|page. Pairs with t96. Effort: M.

tasks.title: Auto-fit content span to available space (wide-screen layout)
tasks.notes: CONFIRMED: on macOS/browser content is a narrow centered column with large empty margins (awkward). Views should expand to use available width/height with a sane max for readability; responsive across phone/tablet/browser. Effort: M.

tasks.title: Collection widget — core (own scroll/gestures, selection, bulk delete)
tasks.notes: First-class collection view owning its viewport+gestures (ends scroll/pan/drag conflicts). select{mode:none|single|multi,trigger:hold,holdMs}; bulkActions:[delete]. Effort: L. Batch 1; queued after Language.

tasks.title: Collection widget — sort / filter / search / group
tasks.notes: Built-in data ops, datakit-backed. Filter operators MUST include isEmpty/isNotEmpty (null), equals, contains, before/after/range — e.g. show tasks where `completed` is empty (incomplete). Effort: M. Batch 2.

tasks.title: Collection widget — row actions + inline edit by type
tasks.notes: rowActions:[{icon/label,fn,args}] (e.g. +add-subtask); inline cell edit per column type via board/LWW. Effort: M. Batch 3.

tasks.title: Collection widget — unified view switch (table/list/cards/tree)
tasks.notes: One node, view: table|list|cards|tree; supersedes separate nodes. Effort: M. Batch 4.

tasks.title: JSON logic: composition verbs + sandboxed expression DSL + builder fn-picker
tasks.notes: sequence/when/setFields/incr/cycle verbs + bounded expression evaluator + builder fn-picker. NO arbitrary code (shared-bundle security; AOT can't eval). Effort: L.

tasks.title: Build-queue: choose from the board what Claude builds next
tasks.notes: A marker/filter (priority or a build-next label) so the board is the selection point for the next batch. Effort: S.

tasks.title: Workspace bundle: import-all / export-all + hidden Admin entry
tasks.notes: One file for the whole platform (all apps). Import-all updates every applet; export-all extracts all to share. Hidden behind a non-obvious gesture (long-press build stamp) + optional passphrase — soft gate, NOT real access control. Effort: M. PENDING: gesture-only vs +passphrase; replace vs merge.

tasks.title: Compact the bottom navigation bar (too tall on phone)
tasks.notes: On phone the bottom NavigationBar + the filter-chip row take too much vertical space (see screenshot 2026-06-06). Reduce NavigationBar height/density; tighten chip sizing. Effort: S.

tasks.title: Editor/detail sheets: Save at top + save/discard/cancel on close
tasks.notes: In record/detail bottom-sheets (e.g. Edit Nodes), the Save sits below the fields and is hidden by the keyboard. Add a persistent Save in the sheet HEADER (always visible); and on close (X / swipe-down / back) prompt Save / Discard / Cancel when there are unsaved edits. Applies to ALL slide-up sheets. Effort: M.

tasks.title: Bundle export must include ui + validate 4-part bundle on Replace
tasks.notes: BUG: applet export omits `ui`, so Replace keeps the target app's old ui → 'unknown table' errors (fridge←taskly). Fix: export writes tables+columns+ui+content; and Replace warns if any of the 4 parts is missing instead of silently half-applying. Effort: S.

tasks.title: isan: Create NEW applet from a file (don't replace an existing app)
tasks.notes: From the launcher, import a full bundle (tables+columns+ui+content) as a BRAND-NEW app with its own id — fridge/others untouched. Distinct from 'Replace applet' (overwrites). Prompt for/derive a new appId, register it in the catalog. Effort: M.

tasks.title: when new sub tasks are added, do not auto populate titles - do note titles as "required" that is a logical rule as well
edit and save with check mark for tasks might make more sense not being on top left

frame of mind of analysis of users and their daily activities and their measurement of exercise work etc could be a feature within neujour - regressions can help find end users draw correlations with daily journal and tasks and other measurements of their being emotions physical health etc - food they eat might be a diary option as well within neujour along with weight- almost feel like these are modules that can be added to neujour almost like applets, applet of applet almost but not exactly as they are meant to be within the applet
click and drag of tasks should scroll so users can move tasks up and down beyond view initially

when add subtask initialized with new view with empty title but no change occurs, it saves when it shouldn't. it should force user to enter a title or auto delete as it should never have fully created a subtask (I noticed sub task counter rises before the view even opens ) unsure best way of handling this logic

tasks.notes:
[from workboard] track:engine milestone:Next units:flutterboard,workboard labels:engine
User-facing filter on any view. Operators: isEmpty/isNotEmpty (null), equals, contains, before/after/range. Example you asked for: show tasks where `completed` is empty (not yet done). Folds into t98. Effort: M.

tasks.title: clicking on columns to reorder; hold to filter (text/regex, and/or)
tasks.notes:
[from workboard] track:engine milestone:Next units:flutterboard,workboard labels:engine
Table headers: tap = sort/reorder, long-press = filter (text + regex, AND/OR).

tasks.title: Language settings (global + per-app) — NEXT
tasks.notes:
[from workboard] priority:high track:engine milestone:Now units:isan,Language / i18n labels:build-once
NEXT BUILD (user-chosen). A global app language + per-app override. Scope: locale picker in settings (t65) + per-app language files/overlays (t80). Effort: L (i18n plumbing once, then JSON per app). Engine-owner session: do this next.

tasks.title: distinguish settings levels (architecture vs app vs view)
tasks.notes:
[from workboard] track:engine milestone:Next units:isan labels:decision
Design the settings hierarchy: platform/architecture vs per-app vs per-view (see d13).

tasks.title: light/dark + custom color themes
tasks.notes:
[from workboard] track:engine milestone:Next units:isan labels:build-once
Theming: light/dark + custom palette (extensible). Overlaps t65.

tasks.title: table view hard to navigate; cut off without full screen
tasks.notes:
[from workboard] priority:high track:engine milestone:Now units:flutterboard,workboard labels:engine
Table view: use full width/height + scroll/paging/sticky header for large tables (related t63).

tasks.title: prioritize tasks: priority tiers separate from phase + sensible defaults
tasks.notes:
[from workboard] priority:high track:engine milestone:Next units:flutterboard,workboard labels:decision,engine
Task model: priority tiers separate from phase; new-task defaults; completion date marks done. Needs t89 (see d10).

tasks.title: Add created / completed / priority columns to tasks
tasks.notes:
[from workboard] track:engine milestone:Next units:flutterboard,workboard labels:engine
Add created / completed / priority columns to tasks — schema for prioritization + worklog stamps.

tasks.title: Events: log into account calendars (Google/Apple)
tasks.notes:
[from workboard] track:apps milestone:Next units:events_app,Identity
From the events decision: authenticate to calendar accounts to pull events (OAuth). Desktop feasibility TBD (see d12).

tasks.title: Extract sync into a fundamental package
tasks.notes:
[from workboard] track:sync milestone:Next units:isan,Sync / Drive labels:shared
Move sync sinks/pipeline out of isan/lib/src/sync into a package. Recommend dbkit or new synckit; keep DbBundle packing in datakit; flutterboard only triggers via functions (see d11).

tasks.title: BIG: Decentralized data — conflict-safe merge (CRDT + signatures, not blockchain)
tasks.notes:
[from workboard] priority:high track:sync units:Mesh (decentralized),Sync / Drive labels:high-leverage,R&D
Major initiative. Flexible data creation + safe merge across devices/people without erasing critical info. Direction: signatures (authenticity) + CRDT keep-both (safe auto-merge) + version vectors (lineage); NOT blockchain (it discards forks). Staged in mesh/ as R&D, integrate at mesh P6. Full design: DECENTRALIZED_DATA.md.

tasks.title: Workboard: single list view + saved preset filter views (fold Recent/Completed tabs)
tasks.notes:
[from workboard] track:apps units:workboard,flutterboard
Consolidate Recent / Completed / etc. into ONE cards view with a search bar + selectable PRESET filter views (saved filter sets you can pick and add to). A preset is just a named filter/sort/group config; the view stays editable. Cuts tab clutter.

tasks.title: Unified editor: merge < > JSON + pencil structured into one view (live preview + side drawer: tree/attributes + JSON toggle)
tasks.notes:
[from workboard] priority:high track:engine units:flutterboard labels:high-leverage
One editing surface. Default = the live 'current view' with placeholders. A collapsible side drawer holds the widget-tree + widget-attribute editors AND a toggle to view/edit the raw JSON, switching back and forth on the same doc. Supersedes the separate StructuredEditor (pencil) + BuilderPanel (< >).

tasks.title: ui.json file edits should reflect (hot-restart) + make < > editor reliably apply to live UI
tasks.notes:
[from workboard] track:engine units:flutterboard,isan
Editing ui.json on disk only reflects after a hot RESTART in debug (file is read at launch), not hot reload. The < > (BuilderPanel) edits don't update the live UI as reliably as the pencil (StructuredEditor) does — repair/unify so layout edits apply consistently. Folds into the unified-editor work.

tasks.title: Author mode via launcher long-press; normal run is read-only (no widget editing)
tasks.notes:
[from workboard] priority:high track:engine units:isan,flutterboard
Long-press an applet on the launcher -> highlight + 'Edit' -> opens the applet in author mode (unified editor, all screens). Normal tap just runs the app with no widget-editing UI. AppScreen gains an editMode flag.

tasks.title: FUTURE: per-widget end-user editing within constraints (e.g. dashboard) without full widget tree
tasks.notes:
[from workboard] track:engine units:flutterboard labels:high-leverage
Mark specific widgets as user-editable with a BOUNDED edit surface (only allowed props), gated separately from full author mode, so an end user can tweak e.g. a dashboard widget without opening the applet's whole widget tree. Builds on the unified editor.

tasks.title: Detail view: side panel on wide/tablet, bottom sheet on phone
tasks.notes:
[from workboard] priority:high track:engine milestone:Next units:flutterboard labels:build-once
CONFIRMED by macOS/browser screenshots: the wide layout has empty space ideal for a SIDE detail panel. Open a row/task's detail in a right-side panel on wide screens; bottom sheet on phone. Per-object-type: side|sheet|page. Pairs with t96. Effort: M.

tasks.title: Auto-fit content span to available space (wide-screen layout)
tasks.notes:
[from workboard] priority:high track:engine milestone:Next units:flutterboard,isan labels:build-once
CONFIRMED: on macOS/browser content is a narrow centered column with large empty margins (awkward). Views should expand to use available width/height with a sane max for readability; responsive across phone/tablet/browser. Effort: M.

tasks.title: Collection widget — core (own scroll/gestures, selection, bulk delete)
tasks.notes:
[from workboard] priority:high track:engine milestone:Next units:flutterboard labels:build-once,high-leverage
First-class collection view owning its viewport+gestures (ends scroll/pan/drag conflicts). select{mode:none|single|multi,trigger:hold,holdMs}; bulkActions:[delete]. Effort: L. Batch 1; queued after Language.

tasks.title: Collection widget — sort / filter / search / group
tasks.notes:
[from workboard] track:engine milestone:Next units:flutterboard,datakit labels:build-once
Built-in data ops, datakit-backed. Filter operators MUST include isEmpty/isNotEmpty (null), equals, contains, before/after/range — e.g. show tasks where `completed` is empty (incomplete). Effort: M. Batch 2.

tasks.title: Collection widget — row actions + inline edit by type
tasks.notes:
[from workboard] track:engine milestone:Next units:flutterboard labels:build-once
rowActions:[{icon/label,fn,args}] (e.g. +add-subtask); inline cell edit per column type via board/LWW. Effort: M. Batch 3.

tasks.title: Collection widget — unified view switch (table/list/cards/tree)
tasks.notes:
[from workboard] track:engine milestone:Next units:flutterboard labels:build-once
One node, view: table|list|cards|tree; supersedes separate nodes. Effort: M. Batch 4.

tasks.title: JSON logic: composition verbs + sandboxed expression DSL + builder fn-picker
tasks.notes:
[from workboard] track:engine milestone:Next units:flutterboard labels:build-once
sequence/when/setFields/incr/cycle verbs + bounded expression evaluator + builder fn-picker. NO arbitrary code (shared-bundle security; AOT can't eval). Effort: L.

tasks.title: Build-queue: choose from the board what Claude builds next
tasks.notes:
[from workboard] track:product milestone:Next units:workboard
A marker/filter (priority or a build-next label) so the board is the selection point for the next batch. Effort: S.

tasks.title: Workspace bundle: import-all / export-all + hidden Admin entry
tasks.notes:
[from workboard] track:engine milestone:Next units:isan,Sync / Drive
One file for the whole platform (all apps). Import-all updates every applet; export-all extracts all to share. Hidden behind a non-obvious gesture (long-press build stamp) + optional passphrase — soft gate, NOT real access control. Effort: M. PENDING: gesture-only vs +passphrase; replace vs merge.

tasks.title: Compact the bottom navigation bar (too tall on phone)
tasks.notes:
[from workboard] track:engine milestone:Now units:isan
On phone the bottom NavigationBar + the filter-chip row take too much vertical space (see screenshot 2026-06-06). Reduce NavigationBar height/density; tighten chip sizing. Effort: S.

tasks.title: Editor/detail sheets: Save at top + save/discard/cancel on close
tasks.notes:
[from workboard] priority:high track:engine milestone:Now units:flutterboard labels:build-once
In record/detail bottom-sheets (e.g. Edit Nodes), the Save sits below the fields and is hidden by the keyboard. Add a persistent Save in the sheet HEADER (always visible); and on close (X / swipe-down / back) prompt Save / Discard / Cancel when there are unsaved edits. Applies to ALL slide-up sheets. Effort: M.

tasks.title: Bundle export must include ui + validate 4-part bundle on Replace
tasks.notes:
[from workboard] priority:high track:engine milestone:Now units:isan labels:build-once
BUG: applet export omits `ui`, so Replace keeps the target app's old ui → 'unknown table' errors (fridge←taskly). Fix: export writes tables+columns+ui+content; and Replace warns if any of the 4 parts is missing instead of silently half-applying. Effort: S.

tasks.title: isan: Create NEW applet from a file (don't replace an existing app)
tasks.notes:
[from workboard] priority:high track:engine milestone:Now units:isan labels:build-once
From the launcher, import a full bundle (tables+columns+ui+content) as a BRAND-NEW app with its own id — fridge/others untouched. Distinct from 'Replace applet' (overwrites). Prompt for/derive a new appId, register it in the catalog. Effort: M.

tasks.title: isan roadmap (synced from Claude)
tasks.notes: Auto-synced from the master task ledger on 2026-06-15. Same content lives in Workboard and Dispatch — compare which design you like.

tasks.title: Move everything to the new home
Live website served from new home
Mobile app released from new home
Future plans rescued from old archive
Desktop (Mac) bridge cutover
tasks.notes: repo side just landed; Mac app rebuild remains

tasks.title: Retire old archive + delete spare repo
tasks.notes: needs you

tasks.title: Engine: maps, cards, dice, draw, charts
Applet store (P0 catalog+install to P1 hosted features)
Make money (tips to subscription to packs)
taskly to Asana-class task and project tool
Vertier - compare/rank/vote platform
tasks.notes: in design

tasks.title: Decisions only you can make
tasks.notes: these unblock the roadmap

tasks.title: Store: own-only vs others? free vs paid? install identity?
Money: launch subscription soon, or grow free first?
Second small server now (~4 eur/mo) or static v0?
Keep or retire the GitHub Pages mirror?
Science / study materials (atoms to chemistry to biology)
tasks.notes: learning vertical: interactive references, flashcards/quizzes, diagrams

tasks.title: Voice creation (text-to-speech)
tasks.notes: decide on-device vs service

tasks.title: Translation (text + speech, incl. on-device AI)
tasks.notes: extends on-phone SLM beyond recipes

notes.title: Engine idea: ref columns are nesting
notes.body: A self-referential ref column (parentId -> tasks) is all you need for hierarchy. Nesting is data, not a special case.

notes.title: Builder: name is the stable key
notes.body: Let users edit the label freely, but keep the column/table name immutable so row values and refs never break.

notes.title: Grocery list
notes.body: Oat milk, eggs, spinach, coffee beans.

notes.title: Pluggable canvas layouts (tree/flow) or chart node first?
notes.body:
[from workboard decision] status:open
context: We can add tree/flow layouts to the canvas node (reshapes the SAME diagram data into hierarchy or flowchart form) and/or a chart node (bar/pie/line for counts and trends). Both are useful — which should I build first?
options: A) tree + flow layouts   B) chart node   C) both

notes.title: Fix devgraph edge-centering offset?
notes.body:
[from workboard decision] status:open
context: Graph node cards became wider than the edge math assumes, so arrows attach slightly off the card center. Purely cosmetic. Fix now or defer?
options: fix now / defer

notes.title: Extract view rendering into a viewkit package?
notes.body:
[from workboard decision] status:open
context: The cards/table/graph rendering currently lives in flutterboard. If the view library keeps growing we could extract a dedicated `viewkit` package. Pure code-organization; no JSON changes. Now or later?
options: now / later (recommended)

notes.title: Where should events sync from?
notes.body:
[from workboard decision] status:answered
context: events_app needs a real data source. Options: subscribe to .ics calendar feeds, a hosted source (possibly paid), or purely user-entered events. This affects the ICS task and the paid tier.
options: ICS / hosted / user-entered / a mix
answer: Calendar feeds (.ics) + optional login to account calendars (Google/Apple).

notes.title: Dating app backend approach?
notes.body:
[from workboard decision] status:open
context: Dating needs storage + matching. The natural fit is the mesh (need-to-know sharing) once P5/P6 land. Confirm mesh-based, or stand up a simpler hosted backend first?
options: mesh-based / hosted-first

notes.title: Monetization model?
notes.body:
[from workboard decision] status:open
context: For heavy hosted logic / analytics: charge a small fee, go free-with-ads, or both (per app)? Shapes the paid tier and events.
options: paid / ads / both / undecided

notes.title: First-run build report?
notes.body:
[from workboard decision] status:open
context: I have structurally validated the Dart but have NOT compiled it. Please run `cd isan && flutter run -d macos` (or -d chrome) and paste any build errors back so I can fix the first compile.

notes.title: Which languages for i18n first?
notes.body:
[from workboard decision] status:open
context: When we add per-app internationalization, which locales matter to you first?

notes.title: Task focus: inline expand or slide-in editor?
notes.body:
[from workboard decision] status:answered
context: How should tapping a task behave?
options: inline / slide-in / both
answer: Inline expand in place; an 'Open task' button opens the full editor in a new view — and make 'open ___' a reusable, JSON-labelled action for notes/recipes/etc.

notes.title: Merge t60 into the new priority-tier model?
notes.body:
[from workboard decision] status:open
context: t60 overlaps the new priority model (now/next/future-important/nice). Recommend merging.
options: merge / keep separate

notes.title: Where should sync live?
notes.body:
[from workboard decision] status:open
context: DbBundle packing stays in datakit; sync sinks+registry move to dbkit or a new synckit; flutterboard only triggers via functions. Pick the package.
options: dbkit / new synckit

notes.title: OAuth feasibility on desktop (Drive + account calendars)?
notes.body:
[from workboard decision] status:open
context: t66 + t91 need OAuth, awkward on macOS desktop. Which targets must support it?

notes.title: Settings hierarchy levels?
notes.body:
[from workboard decision] status:open
context: Organize platform/architecture vs per-app vs per-view settings (capture 37deb0b6).

notes.title: Sync: adopt a library vs bespoke mesh/LWW?
notes.body:
[from workboard decision] status:open
context: Recommend: keep single-writer-through-Dispatch now; adopt Automerge/Yjs or Ditto only when real multi-device/user editing is needed. Don't build CRDT for a problem you don't have yet.
options: keep-bespoke / adopt CRDT lib / Ditto P2P / defer

notes.title: Define one persistence contract
notes.body:
[from workboard decision] status:open
context: seedVersion vs saved-store vs debug-disk vs bundled = 4 sources of truth; caused data-wipe + phone-persist bugs. Pick one load/merge contract.
options: document+refactor / leave

notes.title: Lighthouse app to ship first?
notes.body:
[from workboard decision] status:open
context: Make one app genuinely great + shipped; grow the engine in service of it (avoid platform-forever).
options: taskly / workboard

notes.title: Add a test / golden harness for the engine
notes.body:
[from workboard decision] status:open
context: Engine changes can silently break all apps; Claude can't compile. A golden/widget-test harness catches regressions per build.
options: yes / later

notes.title: Package taskly as a standalone app (future)?
notes.body:
[from workboard decision] status:open
context: Future: taskly as its own app with its own package config, separate from the isan host. Apps may also combine within one app.
options: later
